## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated (TDD: failing test first, then implementation)
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`dotnet test src/avalonia/KeyVaultExplorer.Tests/`)
- [ ] No unrelated changes included
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)

- [ ] Breaking changes: described in "Breaking Changes" section below
